## Summary

Describe the behavior change and affected public surfaces.

## Test-first evidence

- **RED:** Identify the failing test added before implementation.
- **GREEN:** Identify the narrow test command that passes after implementation.

## Contract checklist

- [ ] Specification and grammar updated when syntax changed.
- [ ] Shared conformance cases updated when rendering changed.
- [ ] JavaScript and Python parity preserved where capabilities overlap.
- [ ] Generated artifacts rebuilt where required.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible behavior.
- [ ] Documentation updated for public API or workflow changes.
